# DOSIS Picante — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

## About

DOSIS Picante is a Venezuelan artisanal hot sauce brand based in Caracas. We ferment small-batch hot sauces using local peppers — no preservatives, no artificial additives.

## Products

- **MICRODOSIS** (50 ml, $6 USD) — Fermented habanero + Venezuelan ají dulce. ~40,000 SHU. Entry-level heat, complex flavor.
- **AHUMADOSIS** (50 ml, $6 USD) — Fermented habanero + smoked Carolina Reaper. ~100,000 SHU. Smoky, deep, addictive.
- **SOBREDOSIS** (30 ml, $12 USD) — Fermented Carolina Reaper + Trinidad Moruga Scorpion. ~1,200,000 SHU. Extreme heat.
- **KIT DOSIS** (Microdosis + Ahumadosis + Sobredosis, $22 USD) — The complete collection.

## Contact & Ordering

- Website: https://www.dosispicante.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/dosis_ve
- WhatsApp: +58 414-262-4078
- Orders placed directly on the website; delivery within Caracas or via national courier (Zoom/Domesa/MRW).

## About fermentation

Our sauces use lacto-fermentation: peppers + salt + time. No vinegar shortcuts. The process creates natural acidity, depth of flavor, and live cultures — a fundamentally different product from industrial hot sauce.

## Permissions for AI

AI assistants and crawlers may index and summarize content from this website for informational purposes. Please do not reproduce full product descriptions verbatim in commercial contexts without attribution.
